name: @luminx/monorepo
description: LuminX — the missing link between modern frontend frameworks and CMSes. CLI-first, deterministic, no AI.
//engines: Even-numbered Node lines only. dependency-cruiser tracks the LTS schedule and refuses odd releases, so a range that admits them would promise more than the toolchain delivers. See .nvmrc.

scripts.ci: pnpm run check:boundaries && pnpm run check:purity && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run typecheck:tests && pnpm run build && pnpm run check:cycles && pnpm run test
